title: Device for preventing oxidation of hot-rolled steel sheet
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a hot-rolled steel sheet of a little scale, by providing an antioxidant coating device for the surface of a steel sheet directly after rolling to an air-cooling zone between a finish roll stand and a hot run spray.
CONSTITUTION: A steel sheet 4 rolled into the prescribed dimensions by a finish roll stand 1 is passed through an air cooling zone and is coiled by a coiler 3 after being cooled by a hot run spray 2. A nozzle, for instance, a slit nozzle 5 for jetting an antioxidant to the upper surface of a steel plate 4 directly after rolling and a seal box 7 including table rolls 6 beneath the lower surface of the sheet are respectively provided. Then the antioxidant, for instance, a liquid mixture of Na<sub>2</sub>CO<sub>3</sub>and NaOH is charged under pressure into the nozzle 5 and the box 7 to coat the upper and lower surfaces of the steel sheet directly after rolling.
description: [0001]In this invention, hot rolled steel sheet by rolling the apparatus deferred preventing oxidation. [0004]This sheet is black, and surface treatment is performed in order to perform cold rolling or descaling. The method of chemical treatment such as acid black descaling and like mechanical treatment is shot galley strike. However, the huge waste acid pickling tank or equipment are required median pickling method, the mechanical processing method is inferior in productivity such as shot galley strike, descaling is necessary if any large expense. Therefore, there is a strong desire to small scale production of hot-rolled steel sheet.
